description:
GIVEN an unauthenticated user is on the Login Page
AND the user has TTS Enabled

steps.action:
WHEN the user moves focus to the Email entry
OR the user selects to enter an Email
OR the user complete their Email entry
steps.result: THEN the app reader says "The email field is selected. Please hit select to enter the email address associated with your MLB.TV account. Press or scroll down to enter your password."
